nasb.text: O you who tear yourself in your anger— For your sake is the earth to be abandoned, Or the rock to be moved from its place?

esv.text: You who tear yourself in your anger, shall the earth be forsaken for you, or the rock be removed out of its place?

cnv.text: 你這因怒氣而撕裂自己的， 難道大地要為你的緣故被丟棄， 磐石要挪移離開原處嗎？

ccb.text: 你这气得要撕碎自己的人， 大地会因你而荒凉吗？ 磐石会因你而挪移吗？
